title: Minecraft Bedrock Atmospheric Settings
description: Defines Vibrant Visuals atmospheric effects such as horizon blending, scattering strength, and sky colors.

format_version.description: The schema version used to parse these atmosphere settings.

minecraft:atmosphere_settings.description: The full atmosphere settings payload for Vibrant Visuals rendering.

description.description: Metadata that identifies these atmosphere settings.

identifier.description: The identifier for these atmosphere settings. The identifier must include a namespace.

horizon_blend_stops.description: How the atmosphere is divided up across the horizon blend range.

start.description: The height relative to the horizon where the zenith contribution will take over.

mie_start.description: The height relative to the horizon where Mie scattering begins.

rayleigh_strength.description: How strong the atmosphere's Rayleigh scattering term is.

sun_mie_strength.description: How strong the sun's Mie scattering term is.

moon_mie_strength.description: How strong the moon's Mie scattering term is.

sun_glare_shape.description: How the lobe of the Mie scattering is shaped.

sky_zenith_color.description: The RGB color of the zenith region of the atmosphere. Supports either an RGB array or a hexadecimal color string.

sky_horizon_color.description: The RGB color of the horizon region of the atmosphere. Supports either an RGB array or a hexadecimal color string.

keyframe_number.description: A time-keyed numeric value collection where each key is a normalized time of day from 0.0 to 1.0.

keyframe_color.description: A time-keyed color value collection where each key is a normalized time of day from 0.0 to 1.0.

color.description: A color value expressed as either an RGB array or a hexadecimal string.
